title: gratiola lutea
intro: Gratiola lutea, also known as yellow toadshade or yellow rattle, is a perennial plant belonging to the mint family, Lamiaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its antispasmodic, antiseptic, and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Gratiola lutea include its ability to alleviate symptoms of anxiety and stress, improve sleep quality, and support respiratory health. Gratiola lutea can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, making it a versatile herbal remedy for various health concerns.
